name: pm-os
description: PM operating system for solo founders. Self-sufficient skills encode PM methodology (evaluate, PRD, break-down, experiments, pricing, sunset, weekly review, market scan, memory, leads pipeline). Lightweight chat agents (startup-advisor, product-sculptor, growth-engineer, systems-architect) provide ad-hoc strategic pushback. Product data lives as markdown files in the consumer repo's data/ directory — no external database.
